headline: Amcor PLC (AMCR) Taps Partners for Fiber Packaging Solutions
summary: Amcor PLC (NYSE:AMCR) is among the best Australian stocks to buy in 2026. On April 21, Amcor PLC (NYSE:AMCR) announced that it has collaborated with Metsa Group and G. Mondini to accelerate a fiber-based packaging solution for the food industry. Metsa is a Finnish forest industry group, while G. Mondini is a food packaging provider. […]
